What we make

Six kinds of trouble we get you out of

Pin it, describe it, tell us the deadline . We'll figure out the rest.

Fancy Dress Costumes

Character costumes, headgear and props for school fancy dress days and competitions - built to be worn, not just admired.

₹350 – ₹500

Handmade Working Models

Volcano eruptions, solar systems, DNA strands, water cycles, relief maps - built to actually work, not just look nice on a table.

Starting from ₹500

Chart & 3D Chart Work

Subject charts, timelines and pop-up 3D charts for school projects, presentations and classroom displays.

₹200 – ₹500

Customised Hanging Décor

Wall mobiles, dreamcatchers, name hangings and door décor made for hostel rooms, fests and gifting - your colours, your theme.

Starting from ₹300

Project File Work

Cover pages, index sheets, calligraphy titles, holography and spiral binding - files that look like you actually tried.

₹10 – ₹15 per page

Custom Artwork & Gift Hampers

Portraits, posters, resin keepsakes and personalised gift hampers for birthdays, farewells and everything in between.

priced based on customisation
The thread

From "I need this by Friday" to done

Four steps, strung together - no studio visits required.

01

Send the brief

Message us on WhatsApp with what you need and when it's due. Photos or sketches help, but aren't required.

02

Get a quote

We reply with a price and timeline, usually within a couple of hours. No surprises later.

03

We build it

Our team hand-crafts your piece, with progress photos sent along the way so you know it's happening.

04

Delivered on time

Pickup only - your project is ready for you to collect with enough time to spare before submission.

Pinned up

A few things we've built recently

A small wall of past orders - real briefs, real deadlines.

Before you message us

Things students usually ask

How fast can you deliver? Most orders are ready in 2-4 days. Need it sooner? Rush orders in 24-48 hrs are always welcome.
How do I collect it? Pickup only for now - we'll share the location once your order's confirmed and ready.
Can I see it before I collect? Yes. We send WhatsApp photos as we build, so you can ask for tweaks before it's final.
Can you match my theme or colours? Always tell us the topic, size and colours you need and we'll build around that.
How do I pay? UPI or cash on pickup, once you've seen and approved the final piece.
What if I'm not sure what I need? Just message us what it's for and when it's due . We'll suggest what usually works best.

Submission tomorrow?
Message us right now.

Rush orders are our specialty - we've built a working model at 2 AM before. We'd rather not repeat that, but we can.
